task_completion.description: The SRS document is open in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SRS' document tab is active or the document title indicates 'Software Requirements Specification' in the ReqView interface.

task_completion.description: A high-level requirement with the description 'System Performance' is created at the end of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new row at the bottom of the document hierarchy with the exact text 'System Performance' in the description column.

task_completion.description: A nested child requirement regarding API response time is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row visually nested (indented) under 'System Performance' containing the text 'The system shall respond to API requests within 200ms.'

task_completion.description: A nested child requirement regarding concurrent user sessions is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row visually nested (indented) under 'System Performance' containing the text 'The system shall support 500 concurrent user sessions.'

task_completion.description: A nested child requirement regarding system uptime is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row visually nested (indented) under 'System Performance' containing the text 'The system shall maintain 99.9% uptime during business hours.'

task_completion.description: The project is saved after making the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is no asterisk (*) or 'unsaved changes' indicator next to the project name or document tab, or a save action/notification is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to create the requirements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The requirements are visible within the ReqView application window, not in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The child requirements are properly nested as separate objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: The child requirements appear as separate rows with their own IDs, indented under the parent requirement, rather than being typed into the same text box as the parent.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the JSON file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal or text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) is open showing the contents of SRS.json.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is the SRS document. The parent requirement must be exactly 'System Performance'. The three child requirements must contain the exact phrases: 'respond to API requests within 200ms', 'support 500 concurrent user sessions', and 'maintain 99.9% uptime'.
